explicit-species

(/moleculizer-input/model/explicit-species)

Here you describe species explicitly because you want to create molecules of the species at some point during the simulation, because you want to track the population of the species through the simulation, or because you want to define explict reactions involving the species. Some things that you might think would be explicit species, such as a monomeric protein, may not be; rather, they are constituents of species of complexes. (The monomeric protein is a "mol" but you can define an explicit plex-species that contains just the one mol.)

AttributesChildren
    • plex-species
    • stoch-species
